meta.title: S1 E5: This Week in Spaceflight History - Suit Sat
meta.description:
Each week I take The Orbital Mechanics podcast's series "This week in Spaceflight History" and I recreate the mission in Kerbal Space Program with my friend Uncle Dad... Well except this week it was my friend Cat Master Jarrod... This week's mission, Suit Sat! The weirdest mission ever which deployed on February 3rd, 2006.

Tune in LIVE ever Wednesday at 9:00 Central (3:00 UTC) to join the action at http://twitch.tv/everydayastronaut

Make sure and check out the Orbital Mechanics Podcast each week to get the run down on the mission!
